_README: Credibility allowlist for the library currency-watch (Gate A). Tier is assigned
DETERMINISTICALLY from domain (suffix match) + optional author - never by letting
the model rate how credible the prose 'feels'. A new/unknown domain defaults to
Tier 3 (lead-only) and needs explicit human promotion here. This file is the single
biggest poisoning defense: edit it deliberately.
Tier 0 = primary/official, source-of-truth for its own subject. [verbatim]-eligible;
the only tier the Phase-2 auto-lane will ever auto-integrate.
Tier 1 = reputable named practitioner / named-author research. [secondary] ceiling
unless it quotes a Tier-0 primary.
Tier 2 = reputable org blog WITHOUT a named author; higher novelty/corroboration bar.
Tier 3 = social / unvetted (X, Reddit, generic Medium/Substack/YouTube). LEAD-ONLY:
a post here can only point the crawler at a Tier 0/1 source; it is never the
Tier X = reject outright (content farms, known spam).
MAINTENANCE: you (the user) own this list. The twice-weekly digest proposes new
domains it saw at Tier 3; you promote the good ones into Tier 0/1 here. Author match
lets a named expert on a shared platform (e.g. a Karpathy post on a generic host) earn
their tier. Seeded 2026-06-27 from the watch sources you approved; CONFIRM/TRIM the
Tier-1 indie blogs and add your own.

2._label: reputable org blog, no named author (higher bar)

3._label: social / unvetted - LEAD ONLY (never a citation)

reject_domains: _note: add known content farms / SEO-spam / scraped-mirror domains here; left empty so nothing is wrongly blacklisted on day one
